caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones with a microphone boom is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. In the first frame, he has his eyes closed and his hands pressed together in a prayer-like gesture. By the second frame, he has lowered his hands and is looking forward with his mouth slightly open. In the third frame, he looks downward with a neutral expression. In the final frame, he closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly back. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene throughout the sequence. There are no other people or objects visible in the setting.
